## Description

<!-- Provide a concise description of the change and its goal. -->

## Canons & Ethics Check

- [ ] **Cognitive Load Management:** Is the change easy to understand for the next developer?
- [ ] **Decluttering:** Have you removed unnecessary noise, code, or complexity?
- [ ] **Operational Stability:** Is this a long-term solution or a temporary hack?

## Verification (Boy Scout & Self-Review)

- [ ] **Boy Scout Rule:** Have you cleaned up any orphans or leftovers related to this change?
- [ ] **Self-Review Pass:** Have you re-read your own diff in full?
- [ ] **Audit Loop:** Has the change been audited for safety and correctness?

## Technical Checklist

- [ ] **Single Source of Truth:** Have you avoided duplication in code and documentation?
- [ ] **Agnostic Principles:** Is the implementation free of unnecessary vendor/tool lock-in?
- [ ] **Tests:** Have you added or updated relevant tests?

## Security

- [ ] **Sanitization:** All inputs validated/sanitized?
- [ ] **Authorization:** Proper resource-level access control implemented?
- [ ] **Secrets:** No hardcoded keys or sensitive logs?
